title: EnergySupplySeries
description: A time-series metric of a country's energy/emissions profile in a given year, sourced from OWID (Our World in Data) or IRENA. Adopted in Session 5 (Wave 2 ingest) to carry mixed-license OWID Ember+EI rows and pinned IRENA statistics without losing per-row provenance.

known_failure_modes: Confusing country_iso3 with ISO2 codes — OWID uses World Bank country groupings that aren't strict ISO codes for aggregates like OWID_WRL.
Losing sub_source when compacting OWID Ember+EI rows into a single series — Ember rows are CC BY 4.0 but EI rows are copyright-restricted. sub_source MUST be preserved per-row.
Publishing LCOE values without the technology qualifier — a global average LCOE is meaningless without specifying which technology.
Dropping the citation string during compaction — the license license requires it be attached to the value, not to the file header.

schema_version.description: Semver. Major bump on breaking change; minor on additive; patch on cosmetic.

metric.description: The metric this record reports. *_by_technology metrics require the technology field.

country_iso3.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code, or an OWID World-Bank-style aggregate code (e.g. 'OWID_WRL' for World, 'OWID_EU27' for the EU-27 grouping). Not a strict ISO code for aggregates — see known_failure_modes.

year.description: Calendar year the value applies to. Global Carbon Budget's per-capita CO2 series extends back to the 1700s for some countries.

value.description: The metric value, in the unit named by 'unit'.

sub_source.description: Critical for the OWID mixed-license datasets. e.g. 'Ember' vs 'Energy Institute'. MUST be preserved per-row; never compacted away.

source.description: Provenance chain. Required on every record.

primary.description: The upstream organization that produced the underlying figure. e.g. 'Ember', 'Energy Institute', 'Global Carbon Project', 'Maddison Project', 'IRENA'.

aggregator.description: The aggregator that republished the primary data. 'OWID' or 'IRENA' — nullable if fetched directly from the primary.

fetched_at_utc.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the fetch that produced this record.

license.description: Upstream license identifier for this specific row, e.g. 'CC BY 4.0', '© Energy Institute 2025', '© IRENA 2025'.

citation.description: Verbatim required attribution string for this row. Must travel with the value, not just the file header.

owid_slug.description: OWID grapher slug this record was fetched from, e.g. 'co-emissions-per-capita'. Null if not an OWID-sourced record.

irena_publication.description: IRENA publication citation this record was pinned from, e.g. 'IRENA (2025), Renewable capacity statistics 2025, International Renewable Energy Agency, Abu Dhabi.'. Null if not an IRENA-sourced record.
